docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $496.56 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION, INVESTIGATION DIVISION ROOM 220 AS TO DEFENDANT LEVON FILIAN IND DBA 1220 HAYES APT. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-15-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LEVON FILIAN IND DBA 1220 HAYES APT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION, INVESTIGATION DIVISION ROOM 220 RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEVON FILIAN IND DBA 1220 HAYES APT. $496.56 PRINCIPAL, $15.29 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $511.85 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT LEVON FILIAN IND DBA 1220 HAYES APT. HEARING SET FOR SEP-17-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF SEP-17-1993, GRANTED
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT LEVON FILIAN IND DBA 1220 HAYES APT. MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT GRANTED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT LEVON FILIAN IND DBA 1220 HAYES APT.
